title: Yelland Dry Lake
summary:
Yelland Dry Lake, also known as Dry Lakes is a playa and flat in Spring Valley in White Pine County, Nevada. Its lowest point lies at an elevation of 5,551 feet (1,692 meters). It has been the site of several meteorites.


== References ==
